name: Centrica plc
description: Centrica plc is a leading international energy services and solutions provider headquartered in Windsor, United Kingdom. The company operates primarily in the UK and Ireland, supplying electricity and gas to millions of residential and business customers through well-known brands such as British Gas and Bord Gáis Energy. Centrica is also actively involved in energy trading, power generation, and the development of low-carbon energy solutions, including solar, battery storage, and hydrogen technologies, as part of its commitment to supporting the transition to a net-zero future.
